title: Robust Root Canadian Ginger Noodles
description: A fermented, fluffy, and energizing Canadian dish featuring ginger, with an al-dente finish, low in carbs, served in a hot pot vessel.

ingredients.name: shirataki noodles
ingredients.notes: low-carb, gluten-free alternative to traditional noodles

instructions: In a large hot pot vessel, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and saute for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the fermented vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the shirataki noodles, cooking for 5 minutes or until they reach an al-dente finish.
Stir in the chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
Let the dish rest for 2 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
